ast.name: error
ast.source: Clean AI Paste: Shift+V clipboard read failed
ast.target: Clean AI Paste: Shift+V 剪贴板读取失败

ast.name: error
ast.target: Clean AI Paste 插件错误：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Strips out excessive vertical blank lines commonly generated by AI between paragraphs, lists, and sections.
ast.target: 去除 AI 在段落、列表和章节之间通常生成的过多垂直空行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Removes invisible spaces at the very end of every line. Useful for keeping version control logs clean.
ast.target: 移除每行末尾的不可见空格。有助于保持版本控制日志整洁。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Removes all emojis from pasted text. Useful for keeping notes clean and professional.
ast.target: 从粘贴的文本中移除所有表情符号。有助于保持笔记整洁和专业。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Removes marketing tracking parameters (e.g., ?utm_source=chatgpt.com) from URLs in the pasted text while preserving important query parameters.
ast.target: 从粘贴文本中的 URL 移除营销跟踪参数（例如 ?utm_source=chatgpt.com），同时保留重要的查询参数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Removes bold formatting natively generated by AI for markdown headers (e.g. changes **## Header** to ## Header).
ast.target: 移除 AI 为 markdown 标题原生生成的粗体格式（例如，将 **## 标题** 更改为 ## 标题）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Removes bold formatting wrapper from pasted links (e.g. changes **[Link Text](url)** to [Link Text](url)).
ast.target: 从粘贴的链接中移除粗体格式包装（例如，将 **[链接文本](url)** 更改为 [链接文本](url)）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically shifts pasted headers down by a specific number of levels. Helps prevent deeply nested pasted text from visually overpowering your main document title.
ast.target: 自动将粘贴的标题下移特定级别数。有助于防止深度嵌套的粘贴文本在视觉上压倒您的主文档标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Converts AI-style LaTeX delimiters \( \) and \[ \] into Obsidian's native $ and $$ formats. Works correctly inside table cells.
ast.target: 将 AI 风格的 LaTeX 分隔符 \\( \\) 和 \\[ \\] 转换为 Obsidian 的原生 $ 和 $$ 格式。在表格单元格内也能正确工作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ensures a blank line both before and after horizontal separators (---) so they render correctly.
ast.target: 确保水平分隔符 (---) 前后都有空行，以便它们能正确渲染。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ensures there is an empty line immediately before every code block so it renders completely unattached from previous text.
ast.target: 确保每个代码块之前都有一个空行，使其与前面的文本完全分离。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ensures there is an empty line immediately after every code block. If turned off, normal text will follow directly on the next line.
ast.target: 确保每个代码块之后都有一个空行。如果关闭，普通文本将直接在下一行跟随。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wraps the pasted text with a hidden start and end tracking comment so you can easily identify AI-generated blocks in Source Mode. These comments are hidden in Read Mode.
ast.target: 用隐藏的开始和结束跟踪注释包装粘贴的文本，以便您可以在源模式下轻松识别 AI 生成的块。这些注释在阅读模式下是隐藏的。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The string injected at the very top of the AI paste.
ast.target: 注入到 AI 粘贴最顶部的字符串。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The string injected at the very bottom of the AI paste.
ast.target: 注入到 AI 粘贴最底部的字符串。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shows a small popup notice when the plugin successfully formats pasted text.
ast.target: 当插件成功格式化粘贴的文本时，显示一个小弹出通知。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Paste formatted by Clean AI Paste!
ast.target: 粘贴内容已由 Clean AI Paste 格式化！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Clean AI Paste error: Could not format clipboard data.
ast.target: Clean AI Paste 错误：无法格式化剪贴板数据。
